title: Seven Seas Licenses The Berserker NPC Unknowingly Destroys the World, 4 More Titles
content: Seven Seas Entertainment announced the following licenses on Wednesday: Title: Yes, No, or Maybe? audiobook Creator(s): Michi Ichiho , Lala Takemiya Release Date: April 16 (volume 1, Siren imprint) Summary: Kunieda Kei is the up-and-coming Prince Charming of the evening news.
author: ANN

title: Always a Catch! Anime Casts Yūko Kaida
content: The official website for the television anime of Mayo Momoyo 's Always a Catch! ( Nigashita Sakana wa Ōkikatta ga Tsuriageta Sakana ga Ōkisugita Ken ) light novel series announced on Thursday it has cast Yūko Kaida as Queen Rubini, Renato and Placido's mother.
author: ANN

title: Pan Dorobō Anime's 2nd Promo Video Reveals Main Cast, Ending Theme Song
content: Kadokawa revealed on Thursday the second promotional video and main cast member for the anime of Keiko Shibata 's Pan Dorobō (Bread Thief) picture book. The video reveals and previews the ending theme song "Pan Dorobо̄" by Kyary Pamyu Pamyu : Ayaka Asai stars as Pan Dorobō . Takahiko Kyōgoku ( Love Live!
author: ANN

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender Fans Are Convinced Its Leaked Movie Can Recover With 1 Change
content: Avatar: The Last Airbender ‘s upcoming movie, The Legend of Aang: The Last Airbender , has dealt with delays and scrapped plans for a theatrical run in the lead-up to its release. And the obstacles continued this week, with The Last Airbender movie leaking online months ahead of its October debut.
author: ComicBook

title: WEBTOON Establishes Chief Business Officer Role in Global Leadership Restructure
content: WEBTOON has appointed Leah Goeun Yeon as its first Chief Business Officer. She will oversee the company's webcomic platform business in Korea and other global regions outside Japan, including growth, marketing, content, and creator management.
author: ANN

title: Writer Yukiaki Kurando, Artist WOOMA to Launch New Manga in June
content: The May issue of Akita Shoten 's Bessatsu Shōnen Champion magazine revealed on Wednesday that writer Yukiaki Kurando and artist WOOMA will launch a new manga titled Kimi no Kao de Boku ni Kiss shite (Kiss Me With Your Face) in the magazine's July issue that will ship on June 15.
author: ANN

title: Godzilla Minus Zero: The 7 Biggest Surprises From The New Trailer
content: Godzilla Minus Zero’s first trailer stormed its way online earlier this week, giving us our first look at the King of the Monsters making a comeback with one of the most highly anticipated sequels of the franchise.
author: ComicBook

title: Gorō Kanbe Launches New Manga
content: The story follows the cute-looking high-schooler Anzu, who also likes cute things. He is reunited with his handsome childhood subordinate Kanza, who greets him with a shout of "Golian!" Kanbe launched the Like Two Peas in a Pod ( Nita Mono Dōshi no ) manga in Mag Garden 's Magicomi website in October 2019.
author: ANN

title: YOASOBI Announces 'Never Ending Stories' N. American Tour for August
content: J-pop group YOASOBI and Crunchyroll announced on Wednesday the North American "Never Ending Stories" tour. The tour will run from August 4-16. The tour dates include: • August 2—Chicago, IL—Lollapalooza • August 4—Boston, MA—TD Garden • August 6—Brooklyn, NY—Barclays Center • August 8—Hamilton, ON—TD Coliseum • August…
author: ANN

title: Gundam Unmasks Classic Villain in Surprise Reveal
content: When it comes to Gundam villains, wearing a mask has been a theme that has continued across numerous series. Char, the main antagonist who fought on the side of the Principality of Zeon in the first anime series, was only the beginning when it came to mech pilots who hid their faces from the world.
author: ComicBook
